scripts.build: npm install && (python3 -m pip install -U --pre yt-dlp yt-dlp-get-pot-rustypipe -r requirements.txt || pip install -U --pre yt-dlp yt-dlp-get-pot-rustypipe -r requirements.txt || echo 'Pip failed')
scripts.postinstall: python3 -m pip install -U --pre yt-dlp yt-dlp-get-pot-rustypipe -r requirements.txt || pip install -U --pre yt-dlp yt-dlp-get-pot-rustypipe -r requirements.txt || echo 'Skipping yt-dlp update'
